title: India’s AI boom pushes firms to trade near-term revenue for users
description: ChatGPT and rivals are testing whether India's massive AI user boom can translate into paying customers as free offers wind down.

title: Nvidia challenger AI chip startup MatX raised $500M
description: The startup was founded by former Google TPU engineers in 2023.

title: Self-driving tech startup Wayve raises $1.2B from Nvidia, Uber, and three automakers
description: Major automakers, tech giants, AI companies, and chipmakers are all trying to get a piece of Wayve.

title: Spanish ‘soonicorn’ Multiverse Computing releases free compressed AI model
description: Spanish startup Multiverse Computing has released a new version of its HyperNova 60B model on Hugging Face that, it says, bests Mistral's model.

title: Apple rolls out age-verification tools worldwide to comply with growing web of child safety laws
description: Apple complies with new age-assurance laws in the U.S. and abroad, including those that block users from downloading apps aimed at adults.

title: Uber engineers built an AI version of their boss
description: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said the company’s employees have gone all in on AI, going so far as to build a chatbot of him that they use to practice their pitches.

title: Former L3Harris Trenchant boss jailed for selling hacking tools to Russian broker
description: Peter Williams, the former head of U.S. hacking tools maker L3Harris Trenchant, was sentenced to seven years in prison for stealing and selling his former company’s hacking and surveillance tools to a Russian firm.

title: Google’s new 1.9GW clean energy deal includes massive 100-hour battery
description: Form Energy's iron-air batteries will store wind and solar power to keep the data center running 24/7.

title: CarGurus data breach affects 12.5 million accounts
description: Automotive marketplace CarGurus was the target of a data breach in which the names, email addresses, phone numbers, and physical addresses of millions of customers were stolen.

title: Anthropic won’t budge as Pentagon escalates AI dispute
description: The Pentagon has given Anthropic until Friday to loosen AI guardrails or face potential penalties, escalating a high-stakes dispute that raises questions about government leverage, vendor dependence, and investor confidence in defense tech.

title: Instagram head pressed on lengthy delay to launch teen safety features, like a nudity filter, court filing reveals
description: An email chain with Instagram head Adam Mosseri indicated the company was aware of teen safety issues in DMs in 2018, but didn't launch its unwanted-nudity filter until 2024.

title: More startups are hitting $10M ARR in 3 months than ever before
description: AI has brought the startup world the rise of companies that instantly hit multimillion-dollar ARR. Stripe revealed some data that shows how common this has become.

title: Instagram’s TV app is launching on Google TV devices
description: By bringing Reels to TV, Instagram is looking to better compete with YouTube, which largely dominates the TV space.

title: Treasury sanctions Russian zero-day broker accused of buying exploits stolen from US defense contractor
description: The U.S. Treasury announced it was imposing sanctions against a Russian broker of zero-day exploits, its founder and two affiliates, citing a threat to U.S. national security. Another affiliated zero-day broker in the United Arab Emirates was also sanctioned.

title: Google adds a way to create automated workflows to Opal
description: The company said that a new agent being introduced in Opal will allow users to create mini-apps that can let them plan and execute tasks using text prompts.

title: OpenAI COO says ‘we have not yet really seen AI penetrate enterprise business processes’
description: There is a lot of talk around AI agents taking over business processes and claiming that "SaaS is dead." While these predictions have moved SaaS stocks at times, they haven't really come true.

title: Pete Hegseth’s Pentagon AI bro squad includes a former Uber executive and a private equity billionaire
Apple’s new age verification tools block underage app downloads where required by law
Apple’s touchscreen MacBooks might also have a Dynamic Island
OpenAI defeats xAI’s trade secrets lawsuit
Seedance 2.0 might be gen AI video’s next big hope, but it’s still slop
